scripts.clean:install: rm -rf node_modules admin-dashboard/node_modules customer-web/node_modules staff-mobile/node_modules backend/functions/node_modules admin-dashboard/.next customer-web/.next .next && npm install
scripts.clean:install:fresh: rm -rf node_modules admin-dashboard/node_modules customer-web/node_modules staff-mobile/node_modules backend/functions/node_modules package-lock.json admin-dashboard/.next customer-web/.next .next && npm install
scripts.recover:customer: npm run free:ports && npm run clean:next && npm run recover:chunks -w @nausheen/customer-web
scripts.dev: concurrently -n WEB,ADMIN,MOBILE -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:admin" "npm run dev:mobile"
scripts.dev:all:
node -e "console.log('
  For unmixed logs, run in separate terminals:
    npm run dev:web
    npm run dev:admin
    npm run dev:mobile

  URLs: http://localhost:3000 (web), http://localhost:3001 (admin), Expo Metro (default 8081)
')"
scripts.build:web: npm run build --workspace @nausheen/customer-web && npm run build --workspace @nausheen/admin-dashboard
scripts.firebase:detect: node scripts/firebase/detect-app-framework.mjs customer-web && node scripts/firebase/detect-app-framework.mjs admin-dashboard
scripts.firebase:deploy:hosting:customer: node scripts/firebase/ensure-webframeworks.mjs && node scripts/firebase/ensure-artifacts-policy.mjs && firebase deploy --project nausheen-fruits-new --config firebase.json --only hosting:customer --force
scripts.firebase:deploy:hosting:admin: node scripts/firebase/ensure-webframeworks.mjs && node scripts/firebase/ensure-artifacts-policy.mjs && firebase deploy --project nausheen-fruits-new --config firebase.json --only hosting:admin --force
scripts.firebase:deploy:hosting: node scripts/firebase/ensure-webframeworks.mjs && node scripts/firebase/ensure-artifacts-policy.mjs && firebase deploy --project nausheen-fruits-new --config firebase.json --only hosting:customer,hosting:admin --force
scripts.firebase:release:functions: npm run build:functions && npm run firebase:deploy:functions
